title: Shoot Down the Flag
description: Robin finally admits she wants to live, giving the Straw Hats the answer they needed to fight for her openly.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this part follows Luffy, Nico Robin, Chopper, Sogeking, Spandam. Robin finally admits she wants to live, giving the Straw Hats the answer they needed to fight for her openly.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But, all of you... you're studying

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: That's why... I tried my hardest

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: who can decipher the ancient writings.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: We're already involved. We cannot turn back.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Nico Robin's mother Olivia, has been captured.

summary: Robin finally admits she wants to live, giving the Straw Hats the answer they needed to fight for her openly.
